name: node-to-fast-properties
title: node-to-fast-properties
summary: Force V8 to use fast properties for an object
description:
Force V8 to use fast properties for an object
With to-fast-properties, force V8 to use fast properties for an object.
.
Use %HasFastProperties(object) and --allow-natives-syntaxto check whether an
object already has fast properties.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-to-fast-properties because Force V8 to use fast properties for an object.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-to-fast-properties as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-to-fast-properties with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-to-fast-properties --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
